summary: Completed testing of backend refactoring (P1) and frontend dashboard redesign (P0). Backend: 20/20 tests passed - all API endpoints working correctly after modular refactoring. Frontend: Dashboard loads with timer card, 'Commencer' button, weekly progress, stats grid. Minor UI issue: project selector chips not visible (HTML present but not rendered).

ui_bugs.issue: Project chips are in DOM (5530 chars HTML) but not visually rendered. The horizontal ScrollView may have styling issues in React Native Web.

issues: 'shadow*' style props are deprecated. Use 'boxShadow' - cosmetic only
props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents - cosmetic only

action_items: Fix project selector chips visibility - the horizontal ScrollView in the dashboard is not rendering project chips visually despite them being in the DOM
critical_code_review_comments: Backend refactoring from 2750-line server.py to modular architecture is clean and well-organized
All route modules properly imported and registered in server.py
Dashboard index.tsx has proper data-testid attributes for testing

success_rate.frontend: 90% (dashboard loads, login works, but project chips not visible)

seed_data_creation: Used existing test data. 9 projects available in database.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend refactoring verified working - all 20 API tests pass. Frontend dashboard loads correctly with timer card, weekly progress, stats grid. Project selector section shows 'Projet' title but chips are not visible (DOM has content but not rendered). Clock-in flow requires selecting a project first. Login flow works with text selector 'Se connecter'.

backend.GET_api_root: PASS - Returns API info with modules list
backend.POST_auth_login_admin: PASS - Returns token and user data
backend.POST_auth_login_manager: PASS - Returns token with manager role
backend.POST_auth_login_employee: PASS - Returns token with employee role
backend.GET_auth_me: PASS - Returns user data with valid token

frontend.login_page_loads: PASS - Login form with email/password fields
frontend.login_flow: PASS - Login with admin credentials works
frontend.project_chips: FAIL - Chips in DOM but not rendered visually
